module:
Tag extraction chain for combining multiple strategies.

This module provides a chain implementation that combines the results
from multiple tag extraction strategies with result merging and deduplication.

TagExtractionChain.docstring:
A chain of tag extraction strategies that processes text sequentially.
    
    This chain applies multiple strategies and combines their results, handling
    duplicate tags and merging confidence scores.

__init__.docstring:
Initialize the tag extraction chain.
        
        Args:
            strategies: List of tag extraction strategies
            merge_mode: How to merge duplicate tags ("max", "mean", or "sum")

add_strategy.docstring:
Add a strategy to the chain.
        
        Args:
            strategy: Strategy to add
            
        Returns:
            Self for method chaining

extract_tags.docstring:
Extract tags using all strategies in the chain.
        
        Args:
            text: Input text to extract tags from
            max_tags: Maximum number of tags to extract
            min_confidence: Minimum confidence threshold
            
        Returns:
            List of TagCandidate objects

_merge_candidates.docstring:
Merge duplicate tag candidates.
        
        Args:
            candidates: List of tag candidates to merge
            
        Returns:
            List of merged tag candidates

_normalize_tag.docstring:
Normalize a tag for deduplication.
        
        Args:
            tag: Tag to normalize
            
        Returns:
            Normalized tag

CompositeTagStrategy.docstring:
Strategy that combines multiple other strategies using a chain.
    
    This strategy encapsulates a TagExtractionChain to provide a unified
    strategy interface for a group of sub-strategies.

__init__.docstring:
Initialize the composite tag strategy.
        
        Args:
            strategy_types: Types of strategies to include in the chain
            merge_mode: How to merge duplicate tags
            **kwargs: Additional options passed to all strategies

extract_tags.docstring:
Extract tags using all strategies in the chain.
        
        Args:
            text: Input text to extract tags from
            max_tags: Maximum number of tags to extract
            min_confidence: Minimum confidence threshold
            
        Returns:
            List of TagCandidate objects
